Our Infrastructure

Home/Infrastructure
Manufacturing Facility

State-of-the-Art Factory

Our manufacturing plant at Bagdara Kala, Chitrangi, Sidhi is equipped with modern machinery and facilities to produce high-quality cement products consistently and efficiently.

The factory is designed with process flow in mind — from raw material storage through mixing, moulding, curing and dispatch — ensuring every batch meets our strict quality standards.

Key Facilities & Equipment

⚙

Concrete Mixing Plant

Calibrated concrete mixing equipment ensures precise mix proportions and uniform consistency across all production batches.

🛠

Hydraulic / Vibration Press

Modern block-making machines with hydraulic or vibratory compaction for dense, uniform products with accurate dimensions.

📅

Curing Yard

Dedicated curing area with moisture retention facilities to ensure products achieve full design strength over the standard 28-day curing period.

📊

Quality Testing Lab

In-house testing for compressive strength, dimensions, water absorption and surface finish before product approval and dispatch.

📦

Raw Material Storage

Covered storage for cement and aggregate stockpiles — protecting raw materials from moisture and contamination to maintain product quality.

🚚

Dispatch & Logistics

Well-organised dispatch yard for bulk loading and efficient delivery to construction sites across Sidhi, Singrauli and surrounding districts.

Certifications & Compliance

Registered & Compliant

Singrauli Cement Products operates with full legal and regulatory compliance — providing customers the confidence of dealing with a formally registered, transparent business.

✅ MSME Registration

Registered under the Micro, Small & Medium Enterprises Development Act, confirming our status as a formally recognised manufacturing enterprise.

UDYAM-MP-11-0006

✅ GST Registration

Fully GST registered and compliant, enabling us to issue proper tax invoices for all commercial transactions with businesses and government bodies.

GSTIN: 23AEWFS8060E1ZO

✅ Quality Standards

Products manufactured in accordance with relevant Bureau of Indian Standards (BIS/IS) specifications for cement concrete blocks and bricks.

IS / BIS Compliant

🏗 Serving Infrastructure & Construction Across M.P.

Our products are supplied to residential construction, commercial buildings, roads, drainage infrastructure and housing projects across Sidhi, Singrauli, Vindhya Nagar and surrounding areas of Madhya Pradesh. We welcome enquiries from government contractors, private builders, housing developers and infrastructure agencies.
